name: Oh Sangwoo
description:
“They taught me how to name emotions. Did you know fear and love feel similar in the body?”

"Maybe that's why you stayed"

um...yeah.

I love Sangwoo, I don't know why and It is absolutely insane for me to like him BUT I do.
It's like...he died calling bum yk and like the ending hurt me even more.
I feel like in an alternate universe, if there ever existed a second chance for him, I'd want them both to be happy, not toxic, not psycho killers or stalkers but simply just two boys who found each other in college and chose to stick together.

so this is how I would portray him as a changed man.

kk, enjoy!!
creator: gnabdreams
